name: Special Florentines
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line a baking sheet with foil and a work surface with waxed paper.
3. Melt butter in a heavy medium saucepan over low heat, then remove from heat.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (except chocolate) to the melted butter and stir well until combined.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of batter onto the prepared baking sheet, spacing about 4 inches apart (approximately 5 cookies per sheet).
6. Keep the remaining batter warm over very low heat.
7. Bake cookies for 10 minutes.
8. Remove the foil from the baking sheet and let the cookies cool until firm, about 10 minutes.
9. Using a thin spatula, carefully transfer the cooled cookies onto the waxed paper.
10. Repeat with the remaining cookie batter, stirring well before using.
11. Melt chocolate in a double boiler over gently simmering water; stir until smooth.
12. To assemble: Take two similarly sized cookies and spread about 1 teaspoon of melted chocolate on one. Place the second cookie on top, pressing gently to form a sandwich.
13. Repeat with the remaining cookies.
14. Allow the sandwiches to cool before serving. These can be prepared up to one month in advance and frozen between layers of waxed paper; let them reach room temperature before serving.
